column1: 忙しかったらそれで大変だし、暇だったらそれで退屈だ。
column2: いそがしかったらそれでたいへんだし、ひまだったらそれでたいくつだ。
column3: If busy that brings its own hardship; if free that brings its own boredom.
column4: たら〜で (even if ~ is the case, when it is ~ still)
column5: i-Adj[かったら] + で / na-Adj[だったら] + で
column6: expresses that even when a quality exists at that level, something still follows; 'if it's this way, then...'
column8: たら〜で = one case leads to this; てもそれはそれで = even so; ならそれはそれで = if so then that's fine; ても = even if
